# Keeping data secure from the cloud

<!-- source: 13-ethics-copyright.qmd section "Managing data privacy" (Options 1-4);
     also implements readme.md's planned "fakedataR package" addition -->

Options for keeping sensitive data away from cloud LLMs: local models, separating data from code, ignore-folder patterns, and no-data-retention providers.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge picking the right data-privacy option for a hypothetical sensitive dataset.
:::
